## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Homebase content strategy, performance metrics, and client relationship challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Homebase migration issues causing data discrepancies in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Content performance metrics (cost per click/article) crucial for client evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Team needs to compile comprehensive report comparing AI vs. human-written content performance](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Relationship with Homebase strained; considering escalation to higher management](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)

## Topics

### Search Console Data Issues

  - [Migration to Webflow caused problems with Google Search Console data](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Two GSC instances now exist, complicating performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Team struggling to pull accurate reports for the last 30 days](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [URLs require adjustment (www vs. non-www) for proper data retrieval](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)

### Content Performance Metrics

  - [Current output: 10 content pieces/week, 5 content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Client evaluating based on cost per click/article](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Team needs to demonstrate AI content performance matches or exceeds human-written content](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Recent AI content contributed 5% of overall traffic within two weeks of indexing](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Challenge: Comparing short-term AI content performance to long-standing human-written content](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Client Relationship Challenges

  - [Katie (client) claims human-written content outperforms AI in traffic generation](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Nick (client) focused on unit cost, lacks growth experience](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Potential need to escalate to John (higher management) if performance data doesn't sway decision-makers](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Client pushing for payroll-related keywords](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Team sees opportunities in programmatic content scaling (e.g., business topics across 50 states, 100 cities)](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Suggestion to diversify content topics beyond current narrow focus](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)

### Reporting and Analysis

  - [Need to create comprehensive report comparing AI vs. human content performance](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Challenges in data collection due to GSC issues](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Plan to use both GSC and SEMrush data for a more complete picture](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Pull updated Search Console reports with correct URL formats (www and non-www)](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Compile comprehensive performance report comparing AI vs. human-written content](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Schedule meeting with Kerry to discuss reporting discrepancies](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Prepare objective argument showcasing AI content value (including CRO, backlinks suggestions)](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Consider escalation to John if performance data doesn't resolve issues with Nick](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [Evaluate contract terms and next steps regarding potential project cancellation](https://fathom.video/share/8sFidAjhPYSewsZXNYQmbD4o7G458ZQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
